title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-222)
description: On March 11, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 18.9.2, 18.8.6 and 18.7.6
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 18.9.2, 18.8.6 and 18.7.6
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
